meta.title: Lomas del Pacífico — Oceanview Land in Baja California Sur
meta.description: Private lots of ~1,500 m² on the Pacific coast of Baja California Sur, between Los Cabos and La Paz, minutes from Todos Santos. Own a piece of the last quiet coast.

hero.title: Where the desert meets the Pacific
hero.subtitle: Private lots on Mexico's last quiet coast — 30 minutes from Cabo San Lucas, minutes from Todos Santos.

location.title: The unhurried side of Baja
location.lead: Lomas del Pacífico rests on the Pacific slope of Baja California Sur, in Elías Calles — a name whispered among surfers and those who arrived in Todos Santos before the world did.
location.body1: Federal Highway 19 traces the coast at your doorstep: thirty minutes south lie the marinas and flights of Los Cabos; an hour north, the colonial calm of La Paz. In between — nothing but ocean light, organic farms and some of the finest surf breaks on the peninsula.
location.body2: This is a coast of long horizons and longer evenings. Whales pass close to shore in winter. The desert blooms after summer rain. And the land, held by the same families for generations, is only now — quietly — being offered.

facts.drive3: 1 h to La Paz international airport
facts.surf: World-class surf at Cerritos & San Pedrito

location.mapCaption: Elías Calles — on the Pacific, 30 minutes from Cabo San Lucas

development.title: A master plan measured in horizons
development.lead: {count} private lots from multiple ejidatarios, set within a master-planned community of nearly four thousand — each averaging 1,500 m² of high ground facing the Pacific.
development.body: The lots on offer are a curated selection from several of the ejido's owners — from front-row parcels nearest the ocean to serene inland rises with mountain views. Roads are traced, boundaries are surveyed, and every lot is sold with its documentation in order.
development.masterPlanNote: Full master plan with lot dimensions and road layout

market.title: Thirty minutes from Cabo, a coast on the rise
market.intro: Lomas del Pacífico sits roughly 50 km — about 30 minutes — from Cabo San Lucas, reached by a modern four-lane federal highway.
advantages: Direct, safe access from the four-lane federal highway
Individual lots with legal certainty (certeza jurídica)
A rustic project with strong appreciation potential
A growing area beside the main Pacific developments of Los Cabos
market.opinion1: Lomas del Pacífico holds a privileged position — about 30 minutes from Cabo San Lucas along a four-lane highway, it stands out as one of the best investment options on the Pacific side of the cape.
market.opinion2: With room to appreciate as services, infrastructure and international demand keep growing across the region, it lets you enter early at the most accessible price point on this stretch of coast.
market.disclaimer: Prices are 2026 market observations and may vary by location, services and lot features.
